---
title: Toolbar Select
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/inputs/toolbar-select/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/inputs/toolbar-select/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 400
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-QHhRLJOA8mmpGGbIYjcaBQ7mKync6Xa7U3lZe6POjscJUBjQjWaoVA+oAMT1BqNmuy8MRxGRqLAAEFIlj6i7LuxJJyiJ6GPCfXA7BSJbbGQzxFJpKzdfrHGtw78pRAbgABWwVHY6VbGhx0ZRnC5UYrPLpVDLG2r6CgWBgbOj1EHucGQlAgI5WLDl17vBxVAC+REtCYYHa7FCw8YNQ56ECJYAouHQCBQS9zYEH5KAA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4+AoSICCmIg2oATOAyIBXdvPkZ0Yq8gC8yKzijS4YuuwAecYwAKeWRQ13YsYigGIJCw+LcomLEVOChTBmCIeJyw2TAAESgKKGQANXY4AHd8gjjchIiKUlIAGwAjaKyGnvCsZrbOhjF1dAsKCThWuGIKbt6F9mMnfMlKqrEYUlNa+oWG1qh2qZWwCurkAFltuF3s-Z7iFVJOOG4nYHyAFSPp2uR8gBhFTRCj-
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: ui.toolbar_input_select
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_input_select.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_input_select(id, label, choices, *, selected=None, icon=None,
      show_label=False, tooltip=MISSING, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.update_toolbar_input_select
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.update_toolbar_input_select.html
    signature: ui.update_toolbar_input_select(id, *, label=None, show_label=None,
      choices=None, selected=None, icon=None, session=None)
  - title: ui.toolbar
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar.html
    signature: ui.toolbar(*args, align="right", gap=None, width=None)
- id: variations
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/inputs/toolbar-select/
  contents:
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-updating-core.py
      height: 400
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-updating-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4+AoSIZwoxCu0lx5ilqvW4scAB7o93Xv0HC+EdAFcKRPRAAmcAxEnuzy8gDu7BQqyKFYxFAM-gAUdJ4ANhkSxHrUALwAKgyecACUiPLI1chRMXHsCUn+Yir6gQwpFVU1vbJgACJQFFDIQ6oARqTN-T291XWx8RSkpBkTSSlQGezSEPn9DLsqFP3dEPOXDVgraxsMYupeFBJwGXCGKXNXl+z+B2BJOw4BExDBSIF+gRvj9ehkoBM3gCAGrAiLIACyENMhBhsOqxBUpE4cG4+WA-UKCPeUOQ-QAwiokqdCHSwBiMP0ALrQi74+accj5QUQCQyL5gOC4HFlXn85BlcJ86rxJ7eMQGIzkMQTbwrCASqD+FqkdBaiC0-oAQWNyAA5ABxI7+O3IADyZvY5DO31VHnVmq9ot1FH1EsJUAg0jgr3ehiDlrAAGU3h8RIzmT7ldc1S9A9qQ2H+itpNJ3mJ4YiMonCqRS+9kEmieiADIIt5Z74AAT8HRudlO2cCdGUqcMcBaQJBXUq2d6egongYFzoDKXfgoGU0U6iUZQIFzWB3YOxXQAvrMLVee-p4yYbHQ6Gn5DfA-e4CZKClD0aTZ7yIqARwCOYgzt8ADEyA2v4yCjBAILIISxLEHAyArGhbSjnGg69PEnjoP4wwxrc6xJI8-ovNwY4UF8c41P0x7gpCuJ0QSRIkmSFJgFSEw0qyDJMsIiYcugiZOn83JylclZIv0qIIVigTICkACqBFEf4iosb0gFKq+d5wA+T6GC+ehvoZH7UDRh4RlGMZUdhQaAcOyCgecvSQRmdkYahDlphOyCSNspS+o0+GEVQYgkfc5HPLGaa0T8DFoiezFSZcfnjv8AmZtpNS6deZkGUZz4QPpRjvp+1kUTcdZljGMkZM5wGuWB2aQbW9a+c2FbthkaGkMg-jsNw6DwpoUz1CKsEBMgjXfMQ65WWIxA7MQADWyD5O4zy1V1vVVl0oVYOFRFRaspEPLm8WfHi1TJSCqU4ul8yqKQoKNfki0MBuK1rZtACkyAAExbdtACML2AayYAULg6AICgsMDmAZ5ckAA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-updating-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-H8xBwMg3S4bku4hgiI5xH4DjoNYVRBOM-TJNMrqyj2RGSiM2yPIcbwfF8mH-ICwJgGC9QQoQUJgLGwj6si6D6uaGxogmawFjcZQPOhry2MgkQAKoUVR1hrtyJGxBuH7GF+cDPq+778veZlmN+v5dgB-qBkETHRleZwQVBMFGfByCxq5+E4e5fbIZIjLLrBZG6VQ7Y9LRUzJsG0YscMbH7BxJyGV8oVUJsMJwhJOW8i4NmfvZFkvm+pimY+VWOf+DEUGMpa5kESm9GBcTedBN5+QhJZliFVb5nWvS4aQyDWOw3DoJcmiNBQKiiOQKEQMhnWwcQDgMEYlBiMQTLEAA1t4fDNa1w1jYW0HRQk5GUXFNGTPRbZ5WlHQZQcRzZQpIyqKQBydV4O17dQ8xHZwZ0AKTIAATN4PgAIz-aOZXpLZG12GMcCdl5L6EdG-aDnsfWwUYFC7UUdAwrt+0UL0mik+o0goCAAGk1lcDQQAvmUZWuJg536OgkRuB47BnnudgbiJYAULg6AICgCt4xQYC86iQA
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A toolbar select is a compact select input designed for use in toolbars within card headers, footers, and other constrained spaces.

To add a toolbar select to your app:

1. Add [`ui.toolbar()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar.html) to create a toolbar container, typically within [`ui.card_header()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card_header.html) or another compact location.
2. Inside the toolbar, add [`ui.toolbar_input_select()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_input_select.html) with an `id`, `label`, and `choices`.
3. Optionally set `selected` to specify which choice is initially selected (defaults to the first choice if not specified).
4. Optionally add an `icon` parameter. When an icon is provided without `show_label=True`, only the icon is visible and a tooltip with the label text appears on hover.

The value of a toolbar select is accessible as a reactive value. To access the value:

1. Use `input.<select_id>()` (e.g., `input.view_mode()`) to access the currently selected value.

### Select appearance

Toolbar selects are designed to be minimal and space-efficient. By default:

- The label is visually hidden but available to screen readers
- Use `show_label=True` to make the label visible
- An optional icon can be displayed alongside the select dropdown
- A tooltip with the label text appears on hover when the label is hidden

### Choices

The `choices` parameter accepts:

- A list of strings: `["Option 1", "Option 2", "Option 3"]`
- A dictionary mapping values to labels: `{"val1": "Option 1", "val2": "Option 2"}`
- A nested dictionary for grouped choices (optgroups): `{"Group 1": {"val1": "Option 1"}, "Group 2": {"val2": "Option 2"}}`

Use `selected` to set the initially selected value. If not specified, the first choice is selected by default.

### Updating selects

Use [`ui.update_toolbar_input_select()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.update_toolbar_input_select.html) to change the select's appearance and options:

- Update the `label`, `icon`, `choices`, `selected` value, or `show_label` state
- You cannot add/remove a `tooltip` after creation
- Use [`ui.update_tooltip()`](https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.update_tooltip.html) to update tooltip text

:::{#variations}
:::

### Accessibility

Always provide a meaningful `label` even when using `show_label=False`. The label is used for screen readers and tooltips, ensuring your app is accessible to all users.

See Also: [Toolbar](../../layout/toolbar/index.qmd) | [Select](../select-single/index.qmd)
